remember: Students will be able to recall the uses of different materials used in our daily life.
Students will be able to identify different applications of metals and non-metals in our daily life.
understand: Students will be able to explain the role of noble gases in our daily life.
Students will be able to describe the importance of polymers in our daily life.
Students will be able to explain the significance of biomolecules in our daily life.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of various materials used in our daily life to solve practical problems.
Students will be able to use the properties of metals and non-metals to design new products.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of using different materials in our daily life.
Students will be able to compare the properties of different materials used in our daily life.

ncert_objectives: To describe the uses of some common materials like plastics, ceramics, and concrete.
To explain the applications of noble gases and their uses in lighting and lasers.
To discuss the importance of biomolecules and their role in food and energy production.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the uses of plastics, ceramics, and concrete in our daily life.
Students will be able to describe the importance of noble gases and their applications in lighting and lasers.
Students will be able to explain the role of biomolecules in food and energy production and their importance in our daily life.
